name: Southwestern Broiled Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1 small ripe pineapple, cut into ½-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pineapple slices on a cookie sheet with sides.
2. Melt the butter and brown sugar together in a small saucepan over low heat.
3. Pour the melted mixture evenly over the pineapple slices.
4. Place under the broiler until bubbly and warmed through, stirring occasionally to ensure even heating.
5. Sprinkle with tequila.
6. Serve immediately.
